info.english_meaning: to speak to talk to shine to glow
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: BAzArTe pAwayed granTe pawayed gamane pawet ' (Slo. 76) - devaH

upasarga_meanings.meaning: samUla nazwa kara denA jaq0a se uKAq0a denA
